Android security update end dates — full list

As of July 21, 2026, AndroidGuides.com tracks 130 Android devices (34 Google, 96 Samsung): 65 still receiving security updates, 14 losing support within 12 months, and 51 no longer supported. Data refreshes monthly from manufacturer commitments and endoflife.date.

  • Android security updates for the Samsung Galaxy A57 5G are scheduled to end on April 10, 2032 (released April 10, 2026).
  • Android security updates for the Samsung Galaxy A37 5G are scheduled to end on April 10, 2032 (released April 10, 2026).
  • Android security updates for the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra are scheduled to end on March 6, 2033 (released March 6, 2026).
  • Android security updates for the Samsung Galaxy S26+ are scheduled to end on March 6, 2033 (released March 6, 2026).
  • Android security updates for the Samsung Galaxy S26 are scheduled to end on March 6, 2033 (released March 6, 2026).
  • Android security updates for the Google Pixel 10a are scheduled to end on March 1, 2033 (released March 5, 2026).
  • Android security updates for the Samsung Galaxy A07 5G are scheduled to end on January 30, 2032 (released January 30, 2026).
  • Android security updates for the Google Pixel 10 Pro Fold are scheduled to end on October 1, 2032 (released October 4, 2025).
  • Android security updates for the Samsung Galaxy S25 FE are scheduled to end on September 4, 2032 (released September 4, 2025).
  • Android security updates for the Samsung Galaxy A07 are scheduled to end on September 1, 2031 (released September 1, 2025).
  • Android security updates for the Google Pixel 10 Pro are scheduled to end on August 1, 2032 (released August 28, 2025).
  • Android security updates for the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL are scheduled to end on August 1, 2032 (released August 28, 2025).
  • Android security updates for the Google Pixel 10 are scheduled to end on August 1, 2032 (released August 28, 2025).
